about.title: A Trusted Name for Authentic Andhra Sweets
about.body: Sri Lakshmi Srinivasa Kalakand Sweets & Hots is an authentic Andhra sweet shop specializing in handcrafted Kalakand made using pure milk and traditional methods. We focus on freshness, quality ingredients, and authentic taste — bringing customers premium sweets and savory snacks that remind them of homemade Andhra flavors.

contact.title: Visit Us
contact.address: Near Abhaya Anjaneya Swamy Temple, Gudivada Road, Hanuman Junction, Andhra Pradesh – 521105
